---
title: "Deep learning large-scale drug discovery and repurposing"
author: 
- Yu
- Li
- Yu
- et al.
publication: "Nat Comput Sci, **4**, 600–614 (2024)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - artificial-intelligence
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s43588-024-00679-4
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nat Comput Sci"
issue: 4
page: 600–614
year: 2024
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s43588-024-00679-4
---
